noveltyJustification: Separated product-opportunity rank from Rust-necessity rank and produced evidence-gated phases with an explicit no-Rust outcome.

summary: Ship and measure the Node ONNX/Sharp/Chokidar capability baseline before extracting Rust.
Local multimodal inference is the first plausible Rust extraction because it adds material native compute and can support multiple signals/systems.
Use an existing SQLite vector extension before ANN; add ANN only after measured growth and recall/parity gates.
